title: Reload Attack on Titan gallery image

requirements.summary: Regenerate and reload the Attack on Titan T-shirt image used in the AttackOnTitanGallery component to refresh the static asset with an updated version
acceptanceCriteria: The Attack on Titan gallery image is visibly updated/refreshed in the AttackOnTitanGallery component
The image loads correctly without errors in the gallery
Existing gallery navigation (arrows, thumbnails) continues to function as before

file_operations.description: Update the image reference to use the newly generated Attack on Titan T-shirt image at frontend/public/assets/generated/attack-on-titan-shirt.dim_800x1000.png. Replace the existing image path in the component's image array with this workspace file path to display the refreshed static asset. Ensure the image loads correctly with existing loading states and maintains compatibility with the swipeable gallery navigation (arrows, thumbnails).
